frame_analyses.description: Loop applier (left) and curved scissors (right) entering field. Foam appendage with yellow marking band visible on right post
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good initial positioning with appropriate instruments

frame_analyses.description: Loop applier manipulating pre-tied ligating loop, beginning deployment process
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Smooth loop handling, no apparent tangling

frame_analyses.description: Loop deployed and being positioned around foam appendage. Loop is open and approaching the yellow marking band
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good loop control and targeting toward mark

frame_analyses.description: Loop positioned around appendage, appears to be at or very close to yellow marking band
Loop fully encircling appendage at yellow mark, ready for cinching
Loop appears tightly cinched around appendage at marking band. Appendage shows slight constriction
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Good cinching technique with appropriate tension

frame_analyses.description: Scissors cutting loop tail. Loop remains securely cinched at yellow mark
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clean tail cutting without disturbing main loop

frame_analyses.description: Task completion - loop securely positioned at yellow mark, tail cut, appendage intact
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Successful task completion with good final positioning

confidence_rationale: Loop placement at yellow mark clearly visible in multiple frames. Task completion and timing well-documented. Some phases took longer than expert benchmarks but all technical requirements met.
cannot_determine: Exact sub-millimeter positioning relative to mark center due to viewing angle limitations
technique_summary: Successful novice-level performance with accurate loop placement and secure cinching. Primary time loss in deployment and placement phases compared to expert benchmarks.
strengths: Accurate loop placement at target mark
improvement_suggestions: Practice faster loop deployment to reduce initial phase time from 30s to under 15s
Streamline loop placement phase - 60s duration suggests hesitation or repositioning
